publishedAbstract: * One or more OSD pods remain in CrashLoopBackOff or Init:Error. The expand-bluefs init container logs show: ~~~ inferring bluefs devices from bluestore path 2026-06-05T11:46:43.414+0000 7fe345a9ca80-1 bluestore(/var/lib/ceph/osd/ceph-2)_check_main_bdev_label not all labels read properly, 5!=4 /builddir/build/BUILD/ceph-19.2.1/src/os/bluestore/BlueStore.cc: 8049: FAILED ceph_assert(r == 0) ~~~ * After attempting to wipe the disk with standard tools (wipefs-fa, sgdisk--zap-all), the OSD pod may move past the init container but fail in the main osd container with: ~~~ debug 2026-06-05T17:47:31.165+0000 7f6568ba7640-1 monclient(hunting): handle_auth_bad_method server allowed_methods [2] but i only support [2] failed to fetch mon config (--no-mon-config to skip) ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF OSD pods fail to start with "_check_main_bdev_label not all labels read properly, 5!=4" or "handle_auth_bad_method" after upgrade or expansion
